seoTitle: Jandabup vs Jane Brook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jandabup and Jane Brook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jandabup vs Jane Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jandabup and Jane Brook.
heading: Jandabup vs Jane Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jandabup, Western Australia and Jane Brook, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jane Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Jandabup (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jandabup or Jane Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jandabup has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Jane Brook scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jandabup scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Jane Brook scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jandabup or Jane Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jane Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
